title: Recolored Diamond-Gear
description: recolors the outlines/border (and on tools the the inner color) to be the same as the diamond's color
body:
## Recolors the diamond tools to be more accurate to the actual diamond texture.
## 
- note that diamond, diamond armor model and horse armor remain unchanged

# vanilla vs recolored

recolored

vanilla
